comments.body: Post-1fa8 note: scenario 6 (Verified=-1 BLOCKS submit) requires the Verified submit-requirement flipped ACTIVE (1fa8's remaining live step — applicableIf=is:false today). Do not start S5 before 1fa8 closes (epic-level dependency covers this).

compiled_state.description:
## Why
Epic 88ab (elfish-chair-lug) S5 — the epic's close gate. The pattern's five requirements (R1–R5) must be proven live under multi-agent parallel conditions, not asserted from config. Scripted alongside `infra/gerrit/reviewbot-e2e.sh`; every scenario's change URLs + votes recorded on the EPIC ticket.

## What
Seven scenarios on the running Gerrit against a throwaway `feature/e2e-<date>` branch:
1. **Parallel siblings** — two agents in separate worktrees push independent story changes; both earn LLM-Review + Verified and submit WITHOUT either rebasing (second submit via MERGE_IF_NECESSARY, no manual rebase). Also live-proves webhook + g2p branch-agnostic dispatch.
2. **Stacking** — a third agent pulls the branch (both stories in history) and pushes on top; reviewed diff covers ONLY its delta (assert via robot comment/diff scope).
3. **Merge-back** — --no-ff merge change to main: bot reviews the auto-merge delta only (assert NOT the whole-feature diff), CI green on the merge tree, both votes present, submit lands atomically, replication advances GitHub main with all commits, branch deleted.
4. **Vote-carry on re-merge** — land an unrelated change on main mid-flight; re-merge (MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE): LLM-Review +1 CARRIES, Verified RE-RUNS; then change the feature tip: BOTH wiped (REWORK).
5. **Textual conflict** — overlapping feature-vs-main edits resolved in the merge commit; bot reviews the non-empty auto-merge delta.
6. **Semantic conflict** — textually clean, semantically broken (rename on main + new call-site on feature): auto-merge diff empty, LLM-Review passes, CI red → Verified=-1 BLOCKS submit (two-vote complementarity).
7. **Races + negatives** — concurrent submits into the branch behave; merge push WITHOUT pushMerge refused; branch creation outside feature-branch-drivers refused; reconciler backfills a dropped webhook for a feature-branch change INCLUDING a merge change (transparent merge detection).

## Scope
E2E script + live evidence only. Depends on S1 (config/ACLs), S2 (bot merge path), S3 (CI coverage). Requirement mapping: R1: 2+3; R2: 3; R3: 1+3+6; R4: 1+4; R5: ADR + apt-otter-urn.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Scenario script committed alongside reviewbot-e2e.sh (reusing its helpers where sensible)
- [ ] All 7 scenarios pass live; change URLs + votes recorded on the epic ticket
- [ ] RED/BLUE/GREEN replay (1–3) shows zero vote wipes, zero manual rebases, zero re-reviews of attested stories, single atomic landing
- [ ] Scenario 6 demonstrates Verified=-1 blocking submit on an empty auto-merge diff
- [ ] Cleanup: e2e feature branch deleted; throwaway changes abandoned
compiled_state.title: S5: Live multi-agent E2E validation — 7 feature-branch scenarios on the running Gerrit
